data.title: F&G Annuities & Life to report quarterly earnings on 2026-02-19. Analysts estimate EPS of $1.28. Investors await growth forecast.
data.description: F&G Annuities & Life (NYSE: FG) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Thursday, 2026-02-19. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.28 for the company. It's important to remember that stock prices can be influenced by factors beyond just meeting or missing earnings estimates. Check out the full report for more details.

data.title: TEN Ltd. to present Q4 and year-end 2025 results on March 6, 2026 before the NY market opening. - Important numbers: NYSE:TEN, Q4 and full-year financial results.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Athens, Greece, TEN Ltd. (NYSE:TEN) released news stating it will disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The report is scheduled to be made public before the opening of the New York market on Friday, March 6, 2026. TEN Ltd. is a prominent company operating crude, product, and LNG tankers. This report is highly anticipated in the industry as it will provide insights into the Company's performance during that period.

data.title: Etsy's earnings report expected on 2026-02-19 with anticipated EPS of $0.86. Positive outlook sought by investors.
data.description: Etsy (NASDAQ: ETSY) is set to release its latest quarterly earnings report on Thursday, Feb 19, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.86 for the company. Investors are eagerly waiting for the announcement, with hopes of Etsy surpassing these estimates and providing positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is important for new investors to recognize that stock prices can be significantly impacted by future projections rather than solely relying on past performance. In the last quarter, the company exceeded EPS expectations by $0.11. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones index rises before Fed minutes; Nvidia up on Meta deal, AMD falters. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise in anticipation of the release of the Federal Reserve's meeting minutes. Nvidia's stock saw a notable increase following their deal with Meta. Additionally, AMD faced challenges as its stock prices declined. This update highlights the current market trends, with these notable movements: Dow Jones index rising, Nvidia's stock surge due to Meta deal, and AMD witnessing a decline in its stock performance.

data.title: Global call for judges to evaluate achievements across industries for Globee Awards. SAN FRANCISCO, Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: An international appeal is being made for skilled experts to assist in assessing and acknowledging remarkable accomplishments across various sectors and businesses of every scale. The event is the Globee® Awards for Achievement, a key component of the acclaimed Globee Awards collection. This initiative is based in San Francisco and is set to take place on February 18, 2026. The awards program aims to highlight exceptional achievements and success stories, recognizing excellence globally.

data.title: Study finds red raspberries may improve blood sugar response and cognitive function. Published in British Journal of Nutrition. Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: A recent study conducted in Lynden, Washington on February 18, 2026, revealed positive findings related to post-meal blood sugar response, memory, and learning. The study, published in the British Journal of Nutrition, discovered that a minor dietary change has the potential to enhance metabolic and brain health with age. The research highlighted significant improvements in post-meal blood sugar levels as well as memory and learning functions. These promising results suggest that incorporating this dietary addition could support overall health outcomes in the aging population.

data.title: 20 recipients awarded for Kitchen Innovations by National Restaurant Association Show in 2026. Labor pressures and efficiency considerations key.
data.description: This year's Kitchen Innovations selections at the National Restaurant Association Restaurant, Hotel-Motel Show® in Chicago on February 18, 2026, highlight the impact of labor pressures and operational efficiency. A total of 20 recipients have been chosen for the 2026 Kitchen Innovations (KI) Awards, showcasing innovative solutions that address these challenges in the industry. These awards aim to acknowledge cutting-edge advancements in the culinary world and assist restaurants and hotels in navigating the evolving landscape.

data.title: Global instant noodles market to reach USD 48.5 billion by 2033, growing at a 6.5% CAGR due to urbanization and changing consumer preferences.
data.description: The instant noodles market is experiencing strong growth globally, fueled by factors such as increasing urbanization, higher disposable incomes, and a shift in consumer preferences towards convenient meal options. The market is benefiting from a growing working-class demographic and busy lifestyles, resulting in continued high demand for instant noodles. This trend is reflected in the market's consistent expansion, with significant numbers of consumers opting for quick and easy meal solutions.

data.title: SCANGRIP launches 3 new Danish-made work lights in North America, improving job site safety and efficiency.
data.description: Top-of-the-line lighting solutions from SCANGRIP are enhancing safety and productivity at job sites. The reputable manufacturer from Europe has launched three innovative LED work lights in the North American market. The latest products, AREA 10 CONNECT, NOVA 10, and PROBE 10, offer state-of-the-art illumination for professionals seeking improved visibility. The release comes amid growing demand for high-quality lighting equipment, with SCANGRIP leading the industry. These advancements are set to elevate job site efficiency with cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Hong Kong welcomed Chinese New Year with sponsored Year of the Horse Fireworks Display on Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Hong Kong, the Chinese New Year was joyfully welcomed with the grand "Prosperity Gallops Across Hong Kong" Year of the Horse Fireworks Display. The event was made possible thanks to the exclusive sponsorship from The Hong Kong Jockey Club. The celebration attracted a large crowd in the city and marked the beginning of the new year with dazzling fireworks lighting up the sky. The event showcased the rich cultural traditions of Hong Kong and brought together numerous individuals to witness the spectacular display in honor of the Year of the Horse.

data.title: The RealReal reopens SF store on Feb 26 at 11:00 a.m. for luxury shopping and consignment services.
data.description: On February 26th at 11:00 a.m., The RealReal will be reopening its Union Square location in San Francisco. The store will offer luxury shopping opportunities along with expert consignment services.

data.title: Vishay Intertechnology releases AEC-Q200 qualified 0201 chip resistors for automotive, industrial, and telecom apps.
data.description: Compact devices offer efficient space utilization and strong dependability across automotive, industrial, and telecommunications sectors. These gadgets streamline operations without compromising reliability.

data.title: Sysco launches Home Grown pilot program in 3 U.S. regions, includes Canada. Initiative focuses on locally sourced foods.
data.description: Sysco Corporation, a renowned food distribution leader based in Houston, announced on February 18, 2026, the launch of a new initiative called Home Grown by Sysco. This program aims to introduce locally sourced foods and artisan products to a wider audience. The pilot program is set to cater to various customers and communities, highlighting the company's commitment to promoting regional products.

data.title: Scripps appoints Oliver Gray as VP, network sports and client partnerships to boost connection with advertisers.
data.description: Oliver Gray has been appointed as the Vice President of Network Sports and Client Partnerships at Scripps, starting his new role without delay.
